evals.expected_output: Agent extracts url/apikey/model through /generate-image:steup and sets up the config without exposing the key in summaries.

evals.prompt: /generate-image 一张 1536x1024 的赛博朋克城市夜景，quality=high
evals.expected_output: Agent parses natural-language prompt, size, and passthrough quality parameter, creates a same-resolution placeholder first, then calls generation.

evals.prompt: /generate-image --prompt "minimal product photo of a glass cup" --size 1024x1536 --model gpt-image-2 --param background=transparent
evals.expected_output: Agent preserves explicit CLI-style parameters and reports generated image path or clear failure.

When no URL or API key is configured, Agent automatically enters the /generate-image:steup setup flow and guides the user step by step for API Base URL, API Key, and optional model instead of returning a vague failure.
